common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: merchant_id
common_params.description: Shopee’s unique identifier for a merchant. Required for all merchant level requests(CB CNSC user calling global product related APIs).

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, merchant_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this call to get shop_list bound to merchant_id.

request_params.name: page_no
request_params.description: Specifies the page number of data to return in the current call. Starting from 1. if data is more than one page, the page_no can be some entry to start next call.

request_params.name: page_size
request_params.description: Each result set is returned as a page of entries. Use the "page_size" filters to control the maximum number of entries to retrieve per page (i.e., per call), and the "page_no" to start next call. This integer value is used to specify the maximum number of entries to return in a single "page" of data.No more than 500.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
list of shop authorized to the partner and bound to the merchant.
response_params.name: shop_list

children.name: shop_id
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop.
List of SIP affiliate shops.Only primary shop will return this parameter
children.name: sip_affi_shops

response_params.name: more
response_params.description: This is to indicate whether the list is more than one page. If this value is true, you may want to continue to check next page to retrieve the rest of datas.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/merchant/get_shop_list_by_merchant?access_token=access_token&merchant_id=merchant_id&page_no=1&page_size=100&partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
